54.reason: [Returning 0 indicates "not found", but 0 is also a valid array index in C. In the calling loop, 'while(j)' treats 0 as false, which is okay, but since valid indices are 1..n, returning 0 is acceptable only if 0 is never a valid match — however, due to incorrect indexing, this causes missed matches.]
